positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a group of diverse forest animals—a fox, a deer, and a raccoon—gathered together in a harmonious, interconnected circle. The style should be a blend of Japanese woodblock print (Ukiyo-e) aesthetics and modern graphic illustration. Use clean, bold silhouettes against a muted, textured background of forest foliage and abstract natural shapes. Composition must be central and symmetrical, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Lighting should be diffuse and ethereal, emphasizing the deep contrast between the animals' outlines and the background. Color palette: limited, earthy tones (deep teal, burnt orange, sage green, charcoal black, and ivory). Aspect ratio must be square for maximum print impact. Vector art quality, high resolution, graphic design.
negative: photorealistic, 3d rendering, blur, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, deformed, messy, complex background clutter
